title: Thi Online: Các thì tương lai
summary: 25 câu trắc nghiệm tổng hợp các thì tương lai: TLĐ, TL tiếp diễn, TLHT.

sections.heading: Tóm tắt các thì tương lai
sections.body:
| Thì | Cấu trúc | Dấu hiệu / Cách dùng |
|---|---|---|
| **Tương lai đơn (TLĐ)** | S + will + V | Quyết định tại thời điểm nói, dự đoán (I think...), lời hứa, đề nghị |
| **Be going to** | S + am/is/are going to + V | Kế hoạch đã lên trước, bằng chứng rõ ràng |
| **TL tiếp diễn** | S + will be + V-ing | At this time tomorrow/next week, hành động đang diễn ra tại thời điểm tương lai |
| **TL hoàn thành (TLHT)** | S + will have + V3 | By + thời điểm, by the time + HTĐ |

**Phân biệt will vs be going to:**
- **Will:** quyết định ngay lúc nói ("I'll help you"), dự đoán không có bằng chứng.
- **Be going to:** kế hoạch đã quyết định trước ("I'm going to work in Africa"), dự đoán có bằng chứng.

**Lưu ý:** By the time / as soon as / when + **HTĐ** (không dùng will).

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Các thì tương lai

exercises.question: Our rescue team __________ hundreds of endangered species by next year.
exercises.explanation: By next year → TLHT: will have saved — sẽ hoàn thành trước mốc tương lai.

exercises.question: Mom: I told you to tidy your room. Son: Sorry, mom. I forgot. I ________ it after having lunch.
exercises.explanation: Quyết định tại thời điểm nói (vừa nhớ ra, hứa làm ngay) → will do.

exercises.question: I ____________ the science fiction book by Saturday, then you'll be able to borrow it.
exercises.explanation: By Saturday → TLHT: will have finished — hoàn thành trước thứ Bảy.

exercises.question: By the time I arrive home, the workers __________ repairing my TV set.
exercises.explanation: By the time + HTĐ (arrive) → TLHT: will have finished.

exercises.question: Sally: "Why don't we meet for coffee on Saturday morning?" Willy: "Sorry. I can't. I __________ the doctor then."
exercises.explanation: Kế hoạch đã lên lịch trước (đã hẹn bác sĩ rồi) → be going to: am going to see.

exercises.question: Sarah will have completed all of her duties __________.

options.text: by the time her boss returns
as soon as her boss returned

exercises.explanation: TLHT (will have completed) + by the time + HTĐ (returns). Không dùng will trong mệnh đề thời gian.

exercises.question: I think I ________ an astronaut someday.
exercises.explanation: I think + TLĐ: will be — dự đoán về tương lai.

exercises.question: Next summer, they will have finished building the road ______________.

options.text: as soon as we had come back
by the time we come back

exercises.explanation: TLHT (will have finished) + by the time + HTĐ (come back).

exercises.question: The doctor ________ next week to check on your progress.
exercises.explanation: Next week → TLĐ: will call.

exercises.question: They ________ a new bridge in this province next year.
exercises.explanation: Next year → TLĐ: will build.

exercises.question: My parents ________ our new baby for the first time tomorrow when they come to visit.
exercises.explanation: Tomorrow → TLĐ: will see — hành động xảy ra vào ngày mai.

exercises.question: A: What are your plans after you leave university? B: I _________ in a hospital in Africa. I will leave on the 28th.
exercises.explanation: Plans (kế hoạch đã quyết định trước) → be going to: am going to work.

exercises.question: By the end of next year, my little sister __________ in Germany for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: By the end of next year → TLHT: will have learned.

exercises.question: As soon as my mother finishes her meal, she ________ the dog for a walk.
exercises.explanation: As soon as + HTĐ (finishes) → TLĐ: will take.

exercises.question: I ________ my first three years of university studies by the time I finish the final term tests.
exercises.explanation: By the time + HTĐ (finish) → TLHT: will have completed.

exercises.question: She _________ for a secretary job as soon as she graduates from university.
exercises.explanation: As soon as + HTĐ (graduates) → TLĐ: will apply.

exercises.question: In 2025 she _______ to live in the USA.
exercises.explanation: In 2025 → TLĐ: will move.

exercises.question: A: "Are you ready to order?" B: "I can't decide… Okay, I _____ the steak, please."
exercises.explanation: Quyết định tại thời điểm nói (can't decide → OK) → will: will have.

exercises.question: By the time Janet finishes her study, she ________ in London for 6 years.
exercises.explanation: By the time + HTĐ (finishes) → TLHT: will have been.

exercises.question: I'm sure the party _______ a big success.
exercises.explanation: I'm sure + TLĐ: will be — dự đoán chắc chắn về tương lai.

exercises.question: A: "Are you busy tonight? Would you like to have coffee?" B: "Sorry. I ________ to the library. I've been planning to study all day."
exercises.explanation: Kế hoạch đã lên trước (been planning all day) → be going to: am going to go.

exercises.question: Next week at this time we __________ in the sun in Australia.
exercises.explanation: Next week at this time → TL tiếp diễn: will be lying — hành động đang diễn ra tại thời điểm tương lai.

exercises.question: A: "There's no milk in our house." B: "Really? I _______ some from the shop on the way home."
exercises.explanation: Quyết định tại thời điểm nói (vừa biết hết sữa) → will: will get.

exercises.question: At this time next year, we _________ in our new villa.
exercises.explanation: At this time next year → TL tiếp diễn: will be living.

exercises.question: "Could you help me lift this suitcase into the hotel?" — "I'm not busy. I ________ you."
exercises.explanation: Đề nghị giúp đỡ ngay tại thời điểm nói → will: will help.
